rows.relation: one emitted Phase43 source-root claim plus one compact Phase43 projection proof
rows.note: feasibility-only prototype row: assumes the source surface emitted the proof-native Phase43 source-root claim already derived from the same Phase43 trace and Phase30 manifest; this is not yet a shipped boundary

rows.relation: derive the Phase43 source-root claim from full Phase43 trace plus Phase30 manifest, then verify one compact Phase43 projection proof
rows.note: baseline row: pays the exact source-root derivation work the verifier still needs today because the source chain does not emit proof-native source-root artifacts

rows.relation: one compact Phase43 projection proof envelope
rows.note: causal decomposition row: verifies only the compact Phase43 projection proof that both feasibility variants already depend on

rows.relation: derive the Phase43 source-root claim from the full Phase43 trace plus Phase30 manifest
rows.note: causal decomposition row: isolates the local full-trace and Phase30 work that would disappear only after a source-emission patch

rows.relation: bind one emitted Phase43 source-root claim to a previously verified compact Phase43 projection claim
rows.note: causal decomposition row: assumes the compact proof was already verified and measures only the source-root binding acceptance surface
